mano_cua.result_summary: 精选文章封面图片未保持固定一致尺寸。CSS显示aspect-ratio:16/9但图片实际clientHeight:225 clientWidth:400，图片随容器拉伸(height:100%导致)，非固定尺寸。普通文章列表图片保持一致16:9比例，但featured区域图片尺寸不固定。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: DevTools inspection showed featured article image has aspect-ratio: 16/9 CSS but the image is NOT maintaining fixed/consistent size - it expands to fill available container space. Regular article images maintain proper consistent sizing but featured article image size varies.
